organization: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Government of India
trust_policy: India official livestock-health authority; use for official escalation, disease-control framing, and programme context.

organization: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations
trust_policy: Intergovernmental agriculture source; use for farmer first-aid and low-resource support boundaries.
Indian dairy institution; use for dairy farmer education, milk hygiene, water, feed, calf, and bloat grounding.
Indian university extension source; use for cattle/calf care, housing, feeding, and routine observation.
International public-health authority; use for rabies/bite human-safety escalation boundaries.
Reputable veterinary reference but third-party copyrighted; use paraphrased concepts and internal safety boundaries, not raw copied pages.
